scenarios.description: appendChild on new element with no children triggers ensureChildNodes branch and adds child at index 0
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // childNodes initially EmptyNodes
scenarios.expectedResult: el.childNodeSize() == 1; el.childNodes.get(0) == child; child.parent() == el; child.siblingIndex() == 0
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); Node child = new TextNode("x");

scenarios.description: appendChild on element with existing children skips ensureChildNodes and adds child at next index
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("span"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("a")); // childNodes non-empty
scenarios.expectedResult: el.childNodeSize() == 2; el.childNodes.get(1) == child; child.parent() == el; child.siblingIndex() == 1
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("span"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("a")); Node child = new TextNode("b");

scenarios.description: appendChild reassigns child from old parent to new parent and updates siblingIndex
scenarios.precondition: Element oldParent = new Element("p"); Element newParent = new Element("div"); TextNode child = new TextNode("c"); oldParent.appendChild(child);
scenarios.expectedResult: oldParent.childNodeSize() == 0; newParent.childNodeSize() == 1; newParent.childNodes.get(0) == child; child.parent() == newParent; child.siblingIndex() == 0
pseudocode: Element oldParent = new Element("p"); Element newParent = new Element("div"); TextNode child = new TextNode("c"); oldParent.appendChild(child);

scenarios.description: appendChild with null child triggers validation exception
